full_text:
Cell count average of two counts /ml

total: 30* E6

live: 14* E6

viability: 50 %

size: 8.5 um

Total cell count: 30* E6 / ml

A) RNA/DNA extraction + FFPE sample (4 drops) + Flow organoid (6 drops):

2* 24 well plate

DNA/RNA + FFPE + flow: 40 wells x 40 µl x = 1600 µl

1000 cells/µl = 1.6E6 cells

→ make 2 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 800 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension:

cells in medium → 27 ul of cells + 639.4 ull of medium

ome-gel → 112.8µl

aprotinin → 2.4 µl

thrombin → 2.4 µl

fibrinogen → 16 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 450 uL medium

B) Drug treatment for IF:

384-well plate

Leave outer wells empty = in total plate 308 wells 308 wells x 20 µl = 6160 µl

1000 cells/well = 0.38E6 cells

→ make 2x of 3500 uL on a reservoir, u

volume to take from cell suspension:

cells in medium → 7 ul of cells +2915,5 ul of medium

ome-gel → 493.5 µl

aprotinin → 10.5 µl

thrombin → 10.5 µl

fibrinogen → 70 µl

→ Let it solidify for 40-60 min - add 25 uL medium

→ Next day add drugs using Tecan drug dispenser

D) Sample for Flow - Day 0

→ Collect 1.5.0E6 cells per 900 uL flow staining buffer

E) Sample for cryo

→ Collect 5*E6 cells per 1 mL stemcell banker * 5 tubes

plate (1): For DNA & RNA

plate (2): For Flow & FFPE

Drug treatment conditions (B):

Treatment done on 384-well plate for 25 uL. See plate layout at XX

Note: Plating of omentum gel mixture to 384 well plate was challenging as the mixture was solidifying quickling. So, the plating consistency many not be good..

For flow cytometry on day 0 sample, 1.5*106 cells were taken for unstained control and antibody staining.

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02
